reviews.author: Eric
reviews.title: Wonderful tales told about the untapped rich history of El Salvador
reviews.text: The world needs more amazing tales that dive into the rich history of El Salvador, theres very few books if any about the folklore of this beautiful country. This one shares interesting horror and mystical and historical written stories pass down through generations. I especially enjoyed how a lot of the wonderful characters here often share the same worlds. The book is written very simplified and easy to read so I can share with my bilingual parents or even share the stories around a campfire to younger cousins. You can tell a lot of research was done to collect and write these. I cant wait to see if Federico will continue with new volumes. Each chapter has a great image that accompanies the work. Overall well done, some of these stories will truly stay in the back of my mind for a while.

reviews.author: Mauguilar
reviews.title: Very good book.
reviews.text: This is a good book for anyone that want to learn more about the El Salvador Culture and Folklore. Good book!

reviews.author: Abelino Chicas
reviews.title: EXCELENTE LIBRO
reviews.text: Un libro que abre las puertas para conocer la mitologia y la historia de El Salvador, excelente libro

reviews.author: Del Cid
reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.text: Super Stories and Stellar Fast Shipping and Packing. Look Forward to More! Recommend to All!

reviews.author: Kindle Customer
reviews.title: Wonderful book! very representative of Salvadoran culture
reviews.text: I will really recommend this book to anyone interested in Salvadoran culture; it portraits very well many characteristics of it. Personally, I found it quite nostalgic since it remembered me of many stories I heard during my childhood.

reviews.author: Mauricio argueta
reviews.title: Hits close to home with these great stories
reviews.text: A great depth of knowledge of the folkloric stories of El Salvador, with beautiful illustrations and many interesting stories. Definitely a must for all the English speakers who are curious of El Salvador's culture, traditions, myths and stories over time.

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.title: Cosas que debo saber como salvadoreno
reviews.text: Es muy importante conocer a nuestros escritores

reviews.author: Claudia
reviews.title: Fantastic book
reviews.text: This book is great and is filled with lots of great short stories from El Salvador... thoroughly enjoyable

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.title: Great stories!
reviews.text: The stories are great! They are short enough to read one of two great stories during a short break or free time. This book encourages me to get my passport and explore El Salvador.

reviews.author: Abelino Chicas
reviews.title: EXCELENTE LIBRO
reviews.text: Un libro muy didactico y de mucha resena de las raices y costumbres de El Salvador, enhorabuena por este tipo de literatura
